footer.aboutText: Cambridge English School is dedicated to providing quality education with a focus on holistic development and academic excellence.
footer.address: B. B. Road, Opp. KHB Colony, Doddaballapur - 561203
footer.copyright: © {year} Cambridge English School. All rights reserved.

home.heroDescription: Doddaballapur's trusted English‑medium school — 10+ years of 100% SSLC results, dedicated teachers, and values-based education from Pre‑Nursery to 10th Grade.
home.feature1Body: Pre-Nursery to 10th STD seats available for the upcoming academic year.
home.feature2Body: Rigorous adherence to Karnataka State Board — core concepts, deeply mastered.
home.feature3Body: An unbroken track record of 100% pass results in SSLC board examinations.
home.feature4Body: AI-model digital classrooms with Smart TVs and Tabs, introduced in 2025–26.
home.aboutDescription1: Founded in 2002, Cambridge English School has grown from a humble start of 22 students to one of Doddaballapur's most trusted English-medium institutions.
home.aboutDescription2: Our deeply structured, result-oriented approach has produced a consistent 100% SSLC pass rate since our first batch in 2015. We focus on discipline, integrity, and rigorous academic preparation.
home.testimonial1Text: The discipline and focus on academics here is unmatched. My son's English communication has improved drastically, and he achieved an outstanding score in his SSLC exams.
home.testimonial2Text: We wanted quality English-medium education at reasonable fees in Doddaballapur. Cambridge English School exceeded our expectations. The teachers are incredibly dedicated.
home.testimonial3Text: The emphasis on moral values along with studies is what makes this school special. The campus is safe, teachers are approachable, and my daughter loves going to school.
home.campusLifeDescription: A glimpse into the vibrant daily life of our students on campus.
home.featuredVideosDescription: Experience our school culture, annual celebrations, and the journey of our students through these selected moments.
home.readyToJoin: Ready to Join Our School Community?
home.readyToJoinDescription: Admissions are open for Pre-Nursery to 10th STD. Limited seats available.

whatsapp.message: Hello! I want to inquire about admission to Cambridge English School.

aboutPage.val2Desc: Honesty and strong moral principles guide our students in every interaction.
aboutPage.prinDesc2: We are distinctly structured and disciplined. We firmly believe that academic success requires a rigorous and supportive environment. Our teachers mentor, guide, and push our students to exceed their own expectations.
aboutPage.hist3Desc: The school expanded to include the High School section (Grades 8�10), completing the full primary-to-secondary educational journey under one roof.
aboutPage.val4Desc: We demand rigorous focus and hard work to achieve top academic results.
aboutPage.val1Desc: Routine, respect, and structure are the foundations of all learning.
aboutPage.val3Desc: Treating peers, teachers, and community with utmost respect is mandatory.
aboutPage.prinDesc1: Welcome to Cambridge English School. For over 15 years, we have been committed to providing a sanctuary of learning where every child from Doddaballapur and surrounding areas can receive a top-tier English-medium education.
aboutPage.hist4Desc: Our first 10th-grade batch appeared for the Karnataka State Board SSLC examinations and achieved a remarkable 100% pass result � a benchmark we have upheld ever since.
aboutPage.missionDesc: To provide a structured, disciplined, and safe learning environment where students master the Karnataka State Board curriculum, achieve outstanding results, and develop into responsible, capable citizens.
aboutPage.hist1Desc: School received permission and started with Nursery to 1st Grade with just 22 students � a humble beginning with a bold vision for quality English education in Doddaballapur.
aboutPage.hist5Desc: Upgraded classrooms with AI-model digital infrastructure, equipping each classroom with Smart TVs and Tabs for an interactive, modern learning experience.
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Dedicated to academic excellence and moral integrity since 2005.
aboutPage.visionDesc: To be the leading educational institution in Doddaballapur that empowers students from all backgrounds with high-quality English-medium education, instilling strong moral values and preparing them for a successful future.
aboutPage.hist2Desc: Computer education was introduced from the very beginning, giving students a head-start in digital literacy long before it became common in local schools.
aboutPage.metaDesc: Learn about our history, vision, mission, and the core values of discipline and excellence at Cambridge English School, Doddaballapur.

academicsPage.heroDescription: A structured, disciplined approach to the Karnataka State Board Curriculum, building strong foundations from Pre-Nursery to 10th STD.
academicsPage.curriculumDescription: We adhere strictly to the guidelines set by the Department of Public Instruction, Karnataka. Our curriculum is comprehensive, logical, and highly structured.
academicsPage.step1Body: Play-way method combined with structured early learning. Focus on basic numeracy, alphabet recognition, and motor skills.
academicsPage.step2Body: Building strong foundations in English, Mathematics, Environmental Science, and language subjects.
academicsPage.step3Body: Rigorous academic preparation focusing on core subjects like Mathematics, Science, and Social Sciences, leading up to the SSLC board examinations.
academicsPage.step4Body: First language Kannada, Second language English, Third language Hindi. Hindi subject is included from U.K.G.
academicsPage.digiDesc: Equipped with Smart TVs and Tabs for an interactive learning experience.
academicsPage.approachDesc: We recognize that fluent English communication is critical in today's world. Our medium of instruction is strictly upheld across all classes.
academicsPage.approachListItem3: Regular public speaking and reading exercises
academicsPage.sslcDesc: Our rigorous approach ensures students consistently achieve top ranks and 100% pass results.
academicsPage.sslcBox1Body: Frequent unit tests, mid-term examinations, and monthly evaluations ensure students are constantly revising and identifying weak areas.
academicsPage.sslcBox2Body: Grade 10 students undergo a minimum of 3 full-syllabus preparatory examinations evaluated by experienced board examiners before the main exam.
academicsPage.sslcBox3Body: Dedicated after-school sessions for students needing extra attention in Mathematics and Science. No student is left behind.
academicsPage.beyondDesc: While academics form our core, we believe in balanced development. Our activities are structured and disciplined.
academicsPage.beyondBox1Body: Scheduled PT classes, sports meets, and team games like Kho-kho, Kabaddi, and Volleyball to instil teamwork.
academicsPage.beyondBox2Body: Mandatory reading hours to cultivate a reading habit and improve general knowledge and vocabulary.
academicsPage.beyondBox3Body: Celebration of national festivals and Annual Day to provide a platform for our students' talents.

admissionsPage.heroDescription: Simple, transparent, and merit-based admission process for Pre-Nursery to 10th STD.
admissionsPage.step1Body: Visit the school office or submit an online enquiry. Our team will guide you through the school's philosophy, facilities, and fee structure.
admissionsPage.step2Body: Submit the filled application form to the school office along with verified relevant documents.
admissionsPage.step3Body: A brief interaction with the Principal to understand the child's readiness. For higher grades, a basic written assessment may be conducted.
admissionsPage.step4Body: Upon successful interaction, admission is confirmed subject to the payment of the admission fee.
admissionsPage.feesDesc: At Cambridge English School, we believe quality education should be accessible to everyone. We maintain a highly affordable and transparent fee structure with absolutely no hidden charges.
admissionsPage.valueDesc: Our fees cover tuition, co-curricular activities, and library access. Fees can be paid in convenient installments.
admissionsPage.doc5: Previous year's Marks Card / Report Card
admissionsPage.prospectusDesc: Download our complete school prospectus to learn more about our curriculum, faculty, and facilities.

contactPage.heroDesc: We are here to answer any questions you may have about Cambridge English School.
contactPage.mainCampusDesc: 7GVM+8VV, NH-48, Doddaballapura Main Road, Dargajogihalli, Doddaballapura, Karnataka 561203
contactPage.adminBlockDesc: 32, near telephone exchange, Thyagarajanagar, Doddaballapura, Karnataka 561203
contactPage.waDesc: Get instant responses to your admission queries directly on WhatsApp.

galleryPage.heroDesc: Snapshots of student life, campus activities, and school events.
galleryPage.noImages: No images found in the gallery yet.

principalPage.heroDesc: A word from our leadership on our commitment to excellence, values, and student success.
principalPage.name: Mrs. Seema Yasmin
principalPage.p1: Welcome to Cambridge English School. It is with great pride that I address you as the Principal of an institution that has stood as a beacon of quality education and discipline in Doddaballapur for nearly two decades.
principalPage.p2: Education is not merely about accumulating facts; it is about preparing a child for life. Our philosophy revolves around building a strong academic foundation while simultaneously instilling deep-rooted moral values.
principalPage.p3: Our consistent 100% result in the SSLC board examinations over the past 10 years is a testament to the rigorous, result-oriented approach of our dedicated faculty. Beyond the marks, we are proud of the well-rounded global citizens our students become.
principalPage.p4: As we look to the future, we remain steadfast in our commitment to providing affordable, premium education that transforms lives. I invite you to join our community and partner with us in shaping bright futures.
principalPage.quote: “Education is the passport to the future, for tomorrow belongs to those who prepare for it today.”

resultsPage.heroDesc: A testament to our disciplined approach and rigorous academic standards.
resultsPage.mainDesc: Cambridge English School has consistently secured a 100% pass rate in the Karnataka State Board SSLC examinations. Our structured curriculum and mandatory preparatory exams ensure that every child crosses the finish line successfully.
resultsPage.award1Body: Recognized by the Block Education Officer for outstanding overall SSLC performance in Doddaballapur Taluk.
resultsPage.award2Body: Over 20 students from our school were awarded the state government's scholarship for meritorious SSLC performance.
resultsPage.award3Body: 1st Prize in the District Level Science Model making competition, showcasing practical education.
resultsPage.beyond1Body: Three of our athletes qualified for the State Level Track and Field meet, securing one silver and two bronze medals.
resultsPage.beyond2Body: Our team remains the defending champion at the regional "Knowledge Quest" for three consecutive years.
resultsPage.beyond3Body: First prize in the Kannada Rajyotsava district-level essay writing competition, emphasizing our focus on linguistic excellence.

studentLifePage.heroDesc: A vibrant campus where students grow academically, creatively, and as responsible citizens.
studentLifePage.act1Body: Annual sports meets, Kabaddi, Kho-kho, Volleyball, and daily physical training that builds teamwork and discipline.
studentLifePage.act2Body: School celebrations, Republic Day, Independence Day, and Prathiba Karanji — students shine on stage every year.
studentLifePage.act3Body: Drawing, craft, and art competitions that encourage self-expression and creative thinking from a young age.
studentLifePage.act4Body: Science exhibitions, quiz competitions, and debate sessions that push students beyond the classroom.
studentLifePage.act5Body: Morning assemblies, moral education, and community service activities that build integrity and empathy.
studentLifePage.act6Body: Group projects, study circles, and collaborative learning that develop communication and leadership skills.
studentLifePage.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of students experiencing a holistic, values-driven education at Cambridge English School.

schoolRulesPage.heroDesc: Our rules exist to create a safe, disciplined, and respectful learning environment for every student.
schoolRulesPage.introNote: All students and parents are expected to read, understand, and adhere to these rules. Violations will be addressed progressively — from a verbal warning to parental meetings, suspension, or in severe cases, expulsion. The school reserves the right to amend these rules at any time.
schoolRulesPage.sec1R1: Students must arrive before 8:45 AM. School assembly begins at 8:50 AM sharp.
schoolRulesPage.sec1R2: A minimum of 85% attendance is required to appear for examinations.
schoolRulesPage.sec1R3: All absences must be communicated in advance via the student diary or a written letter from parents.
schoolRulesPage.sec1R4: Habitual late-coming will be recorded and parents will be informed.
schoolRulesPage.sec2R1: Students must complete all homework and assignments on time.
schoolRulesPage.sec2R2: School diary must be maintained neatly and brought to school every day.
schoolRulesPage.sec2R3: Textbooks and notebooks must be covered and labelled properly.
schoolRulesPage.sec2R4: Any form of cheating or plagiarism during examinations will result in disciplinary action.
schoolRulesPage.sec2R5: Students must participate actively and respectfully in class.
schoolRulesPage.sec3R1: Students must treat all teachers, staff, and fellow students with respect.
schoolRulesPage.sec3R2: Bullying, name-calling, or any form of harassment is strictly prohibited.
schoolRulesPage.sec3R3: Use of mobile phones within school premises is not permitted.
schoolRulesPage.sec3R4: Students must not damage or deface school property.
schoolRulesPage.sec3R5: Loud or disruptive behaviour in corridors, classrooms, and the library is not allowed.
schoolRulesPage.sec4R1: Proper school uniform must be worn on all school days.
schoolRulesPage.sec4R2: Uniform must be clean, neat, and worn as prescribed by the school.
schoolRulesPage.sec4R3: Neat haircut and no jewellery (except small studs for girls) is expected.
schoolRulesPage.sec4R4: Sports uniform is mandatory on physical education days.
schoolRulesPage.sec5R1: Students must not leave the school premises during school hours without written permission.
schoolRulesPage.sec5R2: Students are responsible for the safety of their own belongings.
schoolRulesPage.sec5R3: Any damage to school property must be reported immediately.
schoolRulesPage.sec5R4: Students must follow all safety instructions given by teachers and staff.
schoolRulesPage.sec6R1: Possession or use of tobacco, alcohol, or any substances is strictly forbidden.
schoolRulesPage.sec6R2: Any act of violence or physical aggression will lead to immediate suspension.
schoolRulesPage.sec6R3: Theft of any kind will be dealt with severely and parents will be called.
schoolRulesPage.sec6R4: Vandalism of school property will result in disciplinary action and cost recovery.
schoolRulesPage.footerNote: These rules apply to all students of Cambridge English School, Doddaballapura — from Pre-Nursery to 10th Grade. For queries, contact the school office.

antiRaggingPage.heroDesc: Cambridge English School is committed to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive campus environment for every student.
antiRaggingPage.declarationNote: Cambridge English School adopts a strict zero-tolerance policy against ragging, bullying, and any form of harassment. Any act that harms a student's dignity — physically, verbally, or emotionally — will be treated as a serious offence and dealt with firmly in accordance with school disciplinary procedures.
antiRaggingPage.ragging1: Any act of physical violence, hitting, pushing, or harming another student.
antiRaggingPage.ragging2: Verbal abuse, teasing, name-calling, making fun of a student's appearance, caste, religion, or economic background.
antiRaggingPage.ragging3: Threats, intimidation, or coercion of any kind — in person or through messaging platforms.
antiRaggingPage.ragging4: Exclusion, social isolation, or deliberate humiliation of a student.
antiRaggingPage.ragging5: Forcing a student to do something against their will.
antiRaggingPage.ragging6: Cyberbullying — sending hurtful messages, spreading rumours, or sharing photos without consent.
antiRaggingPage.ragging7: Extortion of money, stationery, food, or any belongings from another student.
antiRaggingPage.respStudent1: Treat every classmate with dignity and respect.
antiRaggingPage.respStudent2: Report any incident of bullying to a teacher immediately.
antiRaggingPage.respStudent3: Support and stand up for victims whenever safe to do so.
antiRaggingPage.respStudent4: Refuse to participate in or encourage ragging.
antiRaggingPage.respTeacher1: Actively monitor student interactions in classrooms and common areas.
antiRaggingPage.respTeacher2: Act immediately upon receiving any complaint.
antiRaggingPage.respTeacher4: Ensure the victim feels safe and supported.
antiRaggingPage.respParent1: Teach children to be respectful and empathetic.
antiRaggingPage.respParent2: Report any concerns to the school management promptly.
antiRaggingPage.respParent3: Cooperate fully with the school's investigation process.
antiRaggingPage.respParent4: Monitor your child's social media and online behaviour.
antiRaggingPage.cStep2Desc: Written warning, parental meeting, and suspension from activities.
antiRaggingPage.cStep3Desc: Suspension from school for up to 5 days.
antiRaggingPage.commitmentDesc: Every child deserves to come to school feeling safe, valued, and respected. Cambridge English School pledges to investigate all complaints fairly and promptly, protect the confidentiality of the complainant, and take firm action against anyone found to be engaging in bullying or ragging. We are committed to nurturing an environment where every student thrives — not just academically, but as a person of character.
antiRaggingPage.reportDesc: If you or someone you know is experiencing bullying or harassment, please report it immediately. All reports are treated with complete confidentiality.

facilitiesPage.metaDesc: Explore our modern infrastructure including AI digital classrooms, science labs, library, and sports facilities at Cambridge English School.
facilitiesPage.heroDesc: A safe, structured, and resourceful environment for comprehensive student development.
facilitiesPage.introDesc: At Cambridge English School, we believe a disciplined mind requires a clean, functional, and well-maintained environment. Our infrastructure serves one primary purpose: UNINTERRUPTED LEARNING.
facilitiesPage.f1Desc: AI-model digital classrooms with Smart TVs and Tabs, introduced in the 2025–26 academic year for an engaging and modern learning experience.
facilitiesPage.f2Desc: Well-lit (LED), spacious classrooms equipped with modern learning tools — designed to keep students focused and comfortable.
facilitiesPage.f3Desc: Fully equipped with modern apparatus to ensure students practically understand Physics, Chemistry, and Biology through hands-on experiments.
facilitiesPage.f4Desc: Computer education has been a pillar of our school since the beginning — providing digital literacy and research skills.
facilitiesPage.f5Desc: A quiet sanctuary housing thousands of books — from academic references to classic literature — fostering a love for reading.
facilitiesPage.f6Desc: A large, safe playground for daily physical training, annual sports meets, and team games like Volleyball and Kabaddi.
facilitiesPage.ctaDesc: We warmly invite parents and prospective students to tour our campus during office hours and experience our infrastructure firsthand.
